summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WayofDojo Quiz System for grade knowledge validation. All 14 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: QuizModal.tsx correctly implements all quiz states: intro, question, feedback, results
Questions are shuffled randomly using useMemo with Math.random() - verified working
canvas-confetti library properly integrated for success celebration (>= 70% score)
Tanaka feedback with explanation appears after each answer selection
Progress bar correctly shows Question X/10 format
Category badges (Vocabulaire, Histoire, Étiquette, Techniques, Philosophie) properly styled with distinct colors
Correct answer shown in green, wrong answer in red after selection
data-testid attributes properly implemented: quiz-modal, quiz-option-{0-3}, quiz-button-{grade_id}
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz system fully tested. 6 quizzes available (6e Kyu to 1er Kyu), each with 10 questions. Passing scores vary by grade (6e Kyu: 70%, 1er Kyu: 85%). Questions are randomized on each quiz start.

login_junior_user.details: gratuit@wayofdojo.com successfully logs in and redirects to /fr/aikido/dojo

ceintures_page_quiz_button.details: 'Tester mes connaissances' button visible after expanding 6e Kyu card

quiz_modal_intro_screen.details: Intro screen shows: Maître Tanaka image, 10 Questions, 70% pour réussir, ~5 min durée

quiz_commencer_button.details: 'Commencer le quiz 🚀' button starts the quiz and transitions to question state

quiz_questions_randomized.details: Questions are shuffled randomly using useMemo with Math.random() - different order on each quiz start

quiz_question_display.details: Question displayed with category badge, difficulty level, and points value
quiz_question_display.example: Question: 'Que signifie Tenkan?' - Category: Techniques - Difficulty: moyen - Points: +15 pts

quiz_answer_options.details: 4 answer options (A, B, C, D) displayed with proper styling

quiz_tanaka_feedback.details: Tanaka feedback appears after answer selection with explanation
quiz_tanaka_feedback.explanation_example: Tenkan (転換) signifie 'tourner' ou 'pivoter' - rotation du corps sur place.

quiz_answer_colors.details: Correct answer highlighted in green (emerald-500), wrong answer in red (rose-500)

quiz_progress_bar.details: Progress bar shows 'Question X/10' and fills progressively with amber-to-orange gradient

quiz_next_button.details: 'Question suivante' button appears after answer, changes to 'Voir les résultats' on last question

quiz_results_score.details: Results screen shows score percentage prominently (e.g., 87%)

quiz_confetti_success.details: Confetti animation triggers when score >= 70% (passing score)

success_scenario.message: 🎉 Félicitations ! Tu as validé les connaissances pour ce grade !

failure_scenario.message: 💪 Continue tes efforts ! Il te faut 70% pour valider. Révise et réessaie !

screenshots_taken: 05_tanaka_modal.png - Tanaka welcome modal on Ceintures page
